description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named pre-commit that runs on pull requests and pushes to mainline and release_* branches. Set up an ubuntu-latest job with read permissions to repository contents, using bash as the shell. Configure the workflow to cancel in-progress runs for the same pull request or reference. In the job, check out the code, set up Miniforge3 with conda, and update pre-commit hooks by installing and running them on all files.
